system.description: The first lesson of the Iron Fist is the simplest: a body trained in earnest is itself the weapon. Your stance settles, your knuckles harden, your unarmed strikes carry the weight of years of practice — even if the years are just beginning.
system.effect: +1 damage on unarmed strikes; gain Unarmed proficiency.

wizard.tagline: The body, trained in earnest, is the weapon
